zh.Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France: 法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克
zh.Bar-Le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France: 法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth de Bar-Mousson於大約1200年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，她的父親Thiébaut Ier de Bar45歲，母親Ermesinde de Brienne56歲。她與Walram II van Monschau結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1262年8月1日享年63歲。

zh-hans.Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France: 法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克
zh-hans.Bar-Le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France: 法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth de Bar-Mousson于大约1200年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，她的父亲Thiébaut Ier de Bar45岁，母亲Ermesinde de Brienne56岁。她与Walram II van Monschau结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1262年8月1日享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth de Bar-Mousson was born about 1200, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, her father, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, was 45 and her mother, Ermesinde de Brienne, was 56. She married Walram II van Monschau. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 1 August 1262, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth de Bar-Mousson est née environ 1200, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Ermesinde de Brienne, avait 56 ans. Elle a épousé Walram II van Monschau. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 août 1262, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth de Bar-Mousson um 1200 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thiébaut Ier de Bar 45 und ihre Mutter Ermesinde de Brienne 56. Sie hat Walram II van Monschau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. August 1262 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Bar-Mousson è nata il circa 1200 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Ermesinde de Brienne, aveva 56 anni. Lei sposato Walram II van Monschau. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 agosto 1262, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France: フランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウック
ja.Bar-Le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France: フランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウック
ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Bar-Moussonが約1200年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Thiébaut Ier de Barは45歳，母Ermesinde de Brienneは56歳であった。Walram II van Monschauと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1262年8月1日に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de Bar-Mousson(이)가 대략 1200년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thiébaut Ier de Bar(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermesinde de Brienne(은)는 56세였다. 그녀는 Walram II van Monschau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1262년 8월 1일 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de Bar-Mousson nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Ermesinde de Brienne, tinha 56 anos. Ela casou-se com Walram II van Monschau. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1262, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth de Bar-Mousson родилась около 1200 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Thiébaut Ier de Bar было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermesinde de Brienne, 56. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walram II van Monschau. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 августа 1262 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth de Bar-Mousson nació aproximadamente 1200, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Ermesinde de Brienne, tenía 56 años. Se casó con Walram II van Monschau. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de agosto de 1262, a la edad de 63 años.
